name: Arcanite Magician/Assault Mode
name_jp: アーカナイト・マジシャン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>／</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スラッシュ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>バスター
desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except with "Assault Mode Activate". When this card is Special Summoned, place 2 Spell Counters on it. This card gains 1000 ATK for each Spell Counter on it. You can remove 2 Spell Counters from this card to destroy all cards your opponent controls. When this card on the field is destroyed, you can Special Summon 1 "Arcanite Magician" from your Graveyard.
mnst_eff: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except with "Assault Mode Activate". When this card is Special Summoned, place 2 Spell Counters on it. This card gains 1000 ATK for each Spell Counter on it. You can remove 2 Spell Counters from this card to destroy all cards your opponent controls. When this card on the field is destroyed, you can Special Summon 1 "Arcanite Magician" from your Graveyard.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Trigger, Continuous, Ignition, Trigger
counter: Removes counters from itself for cost
action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Must be Special Summoned by a specific card effect
